title: Vandhen Vandhen Lyrics Panchathantiram
stanzas: <div>Vandhen Vandhen Lyrics Panchathantiram

vandhen vandhen

vairam paaintha
nenjam thaedi  vandhen
enathu kanavu kanavai
eduthu chella vandhen

vandhen vandhen
meendum naane vandhen

yaarodi vaayadi kalliye
villiye thalli podi
raamanin maithili naanthaandi
pombala pokiri odi podi
un aasaiki
aathi seshan theduthodi

pandhiyila pandhikitta
vittu tharuven
yen mundhiyila pangukaetta
vetti puduven

adi kandavalum
vandhu kaiya vekka
avar corporation pump alla

vandhen vandhen
meendum naane vandhen
enathu kanavu kanavai
eduthu chella vandhen

vandhen vandhen
meendum naane vandhen

pesaadhe pesaathe
yesaathe yesaathe

konjam azhagaaga
yaendhaan pirandheno
podhum naan patta paadu

vengai oru pakkam
singam maru pakkam
naduvil naanthaandi aadu

ada yen jeevan ponaalum
un karpai naan kaapen
siri konjam sriraama

vandhen vandhen
meendum naane vandhen
enathu kanavu kanavai
eduthu chella vandhen

vaayendi aadendi
muttithaan paakalaam vaariyaadi
un muttithaan

naan pacha kili
nee vettukili
potti enna di
unna aati veppen
peyum otti veppen
enthan sriraaman mael aanai

vandhen vandhen
meendum naane vanth..

enakku enakku
nee sari sama gama
thathikridithom thathakridithom
hey enakku neeya
unakku naana
ondi ondi paathukalaama
paadendi
jathi podendi

vandhen vandhen
meendum naane vandhen
readyaa

vaayaadi enakku
samamaadi

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Vandhen Vandhen'?

The song conveys themes of love and celebration, expressing joy and excitement in relationships.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Panchathantiram'?

This song is featured during a lively sequence that highlights the characters' joyful moments and interactions.

Who are the singers of 'Vandhen Vandhen'?

The song is sung by the talented Nithyashree and Sujatha Mohan.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Vandhen Vandhen' was composed by the renowned music director Deva.

When was 'Vandhen Vandhen' released?

The song was released on June 28, 2002.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Vandhen Vandhen, the lively duet captures the essence of celebration and joy, making it a perfect fit for festive occasions. The song's upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics reflect the exuberance of love and togetherness. Set against the backdrop of Panchathantiram, it showcases the characters reveling in their relationships. The collaboration between Nithyashree and Sujatha Mohan, combined with Deva's vibrant composition, evokes a sense of happiness and excitement.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vandhen Vandhen from Panchathantiram is a vibrant celebration of love and joy, brought to life by the enchanting voices of Nithyashree and Sujatha Mohan. With Deva's catchy composition, this song perfectly captures the essence of festive moments. Dive into the rhythm and let the upbeat vibes elevate your spirits!
stanzaMeanings: I have come, I have come again. I have come searching for the heart that has been pierced by a diamond. I have come to take my dream and fulfill it.
I have come, I have come again.
Whose mouth is it? Push away the obstacles. I am the one who is like the daughter of Rama. Run away, little girl, and search for your desires.
In the land of the Pandavas, I will give you what you want. I will make you look at me with your eyes.
Even if I see it, I will extend my hand. They are not just any corporation.
I have come, I have come again. I have come to take my dream and fulfill it.
I have come, I have come again.
Don't talk, don't talk, yes, yes, yes.
Was I born a little beautifully? It's enough that I sing the song.
On one side is a tiger, on the other side is a lion. In between, I am dancing.
Even if my life goes away, I will protect your memory, oh my dear.
I have come, I have come again. I have come to take my dream and fulfill it.
Let’s sing and dance, we can see. Your beauty will also run away.
I am a green parrot, you are a hunting bird. I will catch you, oh my dear, and I will make you my own.
I have come, I have come again.
For me, for me, you are right. We have played together. Hey, for me, you and I are one. Can we sing together and break the barriers?
I have come, I have come again.
For me, it is the same.
I have come, I have come again.
